panels.description: 深夜办公室，白领对着电脑焦虑
panels.video_prompt: establishing shot, modern office at night, lone worker staring at computer screen, moody cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field, 9:16 vertical
panels.narration: 凌晨两点，小王收到公司邮件：下个月，AI将接手他的工作。

panels.video_prompt: data visualization, holographic chart showing job displacement by AI, glowing blue lines, dark tech background, 9:16 vertical, cinematic
panels.narration: 根据最新报告，这五个职业正在被AI快速取代。

panels.video_prompt: close-up animated bar chart, red declining bars, financial data streams, modern dashboard aesthetic, dark theme, 9:16 vertical
panels.narration: 第一名：数据录入员。效率比人类快20倍，错误率接近零。

panels.video_prompt: human and AI robot working together at modern desk, warm lighting, collaborative atmosphere, 9:16 vertical, cinematic
panels.narration: 但真正危险的，是那些以为AI无法取代自己的人。

panels.video_prompt: city skyline at sunrise, golden hour, hopeful mood, aerial drone shot, 9:16 vertical, cinematic
panels.narration: 拥抱AI，不是为了取代它，而是让它替你完成重复工作。
